description: Samuel — multi-principal governance. Tracks who has authority over the Covenant Framework when multiple users share an instance. The monarchy: who is king, who are the judges, who are the elders.

principals.note: The primary user. Has all authorities by default. In single-user mode, this is the only principal.

sovereign.description: Full authority. Can do everything. There is only one sovereign.

steward.description: Delegated authority. Can spawn agents, approve plans, run commands. Cannot update Canon, invoke flood, or appoint other principals.

scribe.description: Read and document. Can run observation commands but cannot spawn agents or approve plans.

observer.description: Read-only. Can view genealogy, tithe, audit. Cannot modify anything.

note: In single-user mode (the default), only the 'primary' sovereign exists and governance is implicit. Multi-principal mode activates when a second principal is added via /governance add.
